subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1914-12-13
subcodes.first_line: Last night it rained very hard and I could not sleep more than two hours. I saw many dreams but most of them were short.. I one of the dreams I saw myself in Baghdad living in the same house
subcodes.subjects: @accounts of dreams and visions, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @station of the Manifestation of God
